overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a transitional alpine-desert landscape. The character moves steadily from snow-dusted red rock terrain into dry grasslands with saguaro cacti, with massive snow-capped mountains dominating the background throughout the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail with red rock outcrops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through snow-covered terrain toward the distant mountain range

entered.detail: massive snow-covered mountain peaks forming the backdrop
large reddish-orange rock formation on the right side
patchy snow covering the trail and surrounding ground
sparse brown vegetation on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a snowy mountain trail with the character walking toward distant snow-capped peaks. Red rock formations line the right side while sparse dry bushes dot the left. The ground is partially covered in snow, and the lighting is bright natural daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky desert path transitioning from snow to exposed stone

events.description: snow coverage decreases significantly revealing red rock and dirt terrain

agents.ego_description: navigating the rocky trail as the environment transitions from snow to exposed red stone

entered.detail: layered red rock formations visible on the left side
exposed dirt trail becoming visible as snow melts
tall saguaro cactus appearing in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The terrain transitions from snowy to exposed red rock and dirt as the character continues forward. The red rock cliff moves closer on the right, while layered rock terraces appear on the left. A tall cactus becomes visible in the distance, signaling the shift to desert grassland.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert grassland with saguaro cacti and tall dry grass

events.description: a small desert fox crosses the path from right to left in front of the character

agents.ego_description: walking through tall dry grass approaching large saguaro cacti with mountains looming ahead

notable_agents.action: small desert fox quickly crossing the path from right to left

entered.detail: large green saguaro cactus with multiple arms standing prominently in the field
tall brown grass covering the ground extensively

segments.scene_description: The character moves through an open grassland filled with tall dry grass and scattered saguaro cacti. The snow-capped mountains remain visible in the distance. At approximately 52 seconds, a small desert fox darts across the path from right to left, adding a moment of wildlife interaction to the serene landscape.

agents.ego_description: continuing through the dry grass toward the mountain base with scattered bushes nearby

entered.detail: small rocky elevation on the right side of the path
patch of green vegetation contrasting with the dry grass

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character continuing through the open grassland as the terrain gradually becomes more rocky. The large cacti are left behind, replaced by scattered bushes and rocky outcrops. The snow-capped mountains remain a constant presence in the background as the journey continues toward the foothills.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transforms from a snowy alpine path into an arid red rock desert. It begins with the character walking toward distant snow-capped peaks across ground partially covered in snow, flanked by red rock formations and sparse dry bushes. As the character continues forward, the snow gradually recedes to reveal exposed red rock and dirt. The scene then shifts as the red rock cliff closes in on the right and layered rock terraces emerge on the left, before a tall cactus appears in the distance to signal the transition into desert grassland.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a serene desert grassland that gradually transitions into a rugged, rocky terrain. It begins with the character traversing an open expanse of tall dry grass and scattered saguaro cacti, with massive snow-capped mountains looming in the distance. As the journey progresses, a small desert fox darts across the path from right to left, adding a brief moment of wildlife interaction to the quiet landscape. The scene then shifts as the large cacti fade from view, replaced by scattered bushes and rocky outcrops. Finally, the camera continues its steady forward motion, moving away from the grasslands and toward the foothills of the distant mountains.
